story.text: *The Parallel Society — 19 proverbs, one line carried from each spell.*

> A parallel society is being born in the networks. > — Parallel Society Grimoire > A technology for governance with a limited shelf life. > — The Peace That Became a Prison > Two-thirds of humanity lives under failing governance. > — The Rusted Crowns > Pirates wrote democratic constitutions. > — The Cambrian Garden > The cypherpunks built the future. > — The Cypherpunk Prophecies > Governance without centralized authority. > — The Drake's Deeper Teachings > Tools and wisdom—both necessary. > — The Arsenal and the Grimoire > Makes corruption visible and provable. > — The Corruption That Crypto Cures > The question reveals Westphalian obsolescence. > — The Cyberstate Question > Exit is the fundamental right. > — Exit, Exile, and Access > A bundle of functions that can be distributed. > — Rethinking Sovereignty > The balance is governance. > — Rights and Responsibilities > Coordination without control. > — How Communities Collaborate > Exit, fork, or arbitration—never conquest. > — When Communities Conflict > Technology creates possibilities; humans choose. > — Technology Deep Dive > The right to exit trumps community integrity. > — Conceptual Limits > The new order already existed. > — Are Blockchain Communities Inevitable? > Nothing to lose but tyranny. > — Values and the Technology Stack > Farewell to Westphalia. Welcome to the Parallel Society. > — Parallel Society Grimoire
*The Parallel Society — 19 proverbs, one line carried from each spell.*

Welcome to the Parallel Society. > — Parallel Society Grimoire
